_comment: Species: Seven-Colored Deer (七色鹿) from A Will Eternal. Canonical definition with all 13 fields per the Er Gen simulation spec. Prime Directive: Reality is objective; cultivation changes understanding, not existence. Every state described here exists independently of the player's perception.
name: Seven-Colored Deer

canonical.appearance: Deer 2 m tall, coat shifts through seven colors, antlers of crystal
canonical.size: 2 m adult, 300 jin; ancient 5 m, 5000 jin
canonical.behavior: Auspicious beast; appears to cultivators at breakthroughs; cultivates by walking auspicious paths
canonical.ecology: Inferred AFTER canonical fields; see ecosystem definitions.

inner_dan_properties.canon_note: seven_colored_deer — no specific inner dan documented in canon

art_direction.generator: single canonical definition drives 10 life-state variants
art_direction.note: Per art-direction directive: build generators, not assets.
